nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Microspingus
nodes.summary: Microspingus（Microspingus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如Plain-tailed warbling finch、Rusty-browed warbling finch、Buff-throated warbling finch等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cinereous warbling finch
nodes.summary: Cinereous warbling finch（Microspingus cinereus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Cinereous warbling finch。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Cinereous warbling finch
nodes.summary: The cinereous warbling finch (Microspingus cinereus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Brazil. The term cinereous describes its colouration. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The cinereous warbling finch (Microspingus cinereus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Brazil.

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
